title: Magnetoelectric Control of Toroidal Moment in Ferroaxial Crystal PbMn$_{2}$Ni$_{6}$Te$_{3}$O$_{18}$
summary: Ferroic multipole orders break some symmetry and often activate unique physical properties, such as nonreciprocal directional dichroism and linear magnetoelectric effects. Here, we demonstrate the control of magnetic toroidal orientation in PbMn$_{2}$Ni$_{6}$Te$_{3}$O$_{18}$ through the application of electric and magnetic fields in two distinct configurations. Through directional dichroism, we successfully visualize magnetic ferrotoroidic domains, establishing the intrinsic coupling among magnetic toroidal moment, crystallographic ferroaxial moment, and magnetoelectric monopoles. Our findings not only present an effective pathway for controlling magnetic toroidal moment but also provide a novel approach for investigating ferroaxial ordering.

AI.tldr: 通过电场和磁场控制PbMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈中的磁环矩取向，利用方向二色性可视化磁铁环畴，揭示磁环矩、晶体铁轴矩和磁电单极子之间的本征耦合
AI.motivation: 铁性多极序破坏某些对称性并常激活独特的物理性质（如非互易方向二色性和线性磁电效应），但磁环矩的控制和可视化研究仍需深入
AI.method: 在PbMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈材料中，采用两种不同配置的电场和磁场来控制磁环矩取向，通过方向二色性技术可视化磁铁环畴
AI.result: 成功实现了磁环矩取向的电/磁场控制，可视化展示了磁铁环畴结构，建立了磁环矩、晶体铁轴矩和磁电单极子之间的本征耦合关系
AI.conclusion: 该研究不仅提供了控制磁环矩的有效途径，还为研究铁轴序提供了一种新方法，揭示了多极序物理中的基本耦合机制

title: The $\mathbb{Z}_N^{\times 3}$ symmetry protected boundary modes in two-dimensional Potts paramagnets
summary: We construct and analyze a class of one-dimensional boundary Hamiltonians arising from two-dimensional symmetry-protected topological phases with $\mathbb{Z}_N^{\times 3}$ symmetry on a triangular lattice. Using a cohomology-based transformation, the lattice models for the edge modes are explicitly obtained, and their structure is shown to be governed by the arithmetic properties of $N$. For prime $N$, the boundary theory admits a formulation in terms of mutually commuting Temperley-Lieb algebras. For the composite values of $N$, the models exhibit hierarchical or factorized structures. We demonstrate that all phases can be understood in terms of primary models augmented by local defect degrees of freedom that partition the system into independent segments. Finally, the global symmetry is realized on the boundary in a non-on-site and anomalous manner via a projective representation, directly realizing the corresponding 't Hooft anomaly.

AI.tldr: 该论文构建并分析了一维边界哈密顿量，这些哈密顿量源于二维对称保护拓扑相，具有三角晶格上的$\mathbb{Z}_N^{\times 3}$对称性。通过上同调变换获得边缘模式的晶格模型，其结构由$N$的算术性质决定。
AI.motivation: 研究二维对称保护拓扑相在一维边界上的实现，特别是探索边界理论如何反映体相的拓扑性质，以及对称性在边界上的非局域和反常实现方式。
AI.method: 使用上同调变换从二维对称保护拓扑相构造一维边界哈密顿量，分析$N$为素数和复合数时的不同结构，采用Temperley-Lieb代数描述，并通过局部缺陷自由度理解相的分层结构。
AI.result: 对于素数$N$，边界理论可以用相互对易的Temperley-Lieb代数描述；对于复合$N$，模型呈现分层或因子化结构。所有相都可以通过主模型加上局部缺陷自由度来理解，这些自由度将系统划分为独立片段。
AI.conclusion: 全局对称性通过投影表示在边界上以非局域和反常方式实现，直接对应相应的't Hooft反常。这为理解对称保护拓扑相的边界物理提供了系统框架。

title: Optical frequency comb Fourier transform spectroscopy of the CH$_2$$^{79}$Br$^{81}$Br, CH$_2$$^{79}$Br$_2$, and CH$_2$$^{81}$Br$_2$ isotopologues in the 1180-1210 cm$^{-1}$ region
summary: Quantitative spectroscopic detection of dibromomethane, CH$_2$Br$_2$, for environmental monitoring, workplace safety, and exoplanetary studies is limited by the lack of accurate absorption cross-section data and rigorous spectroscopic models. We report the first high-resolution (6.3 MHz point spacing) absorption cross-section of CH$_2$Br$_2$ in the 1180-1210 cm$^{-1}$ region measured using optical frequency comb Fourier transform spectroscopy. This region is dominated by the strong CH$_2$ wagging ($ν$$_8$) fundamental vibration, which is about 50 times stronger than the fundamental C-H stretch around 3077 cm$^{-1}$. The measurements resolve isotopologue-specific rovibrational features of CH$_2$$^{79}$Br$^{81}$Br, CH$_2$$^{79}$Br$_2$, and CH$_2$$^{81}$Br$_2$, and we assign rovibrational transitions of the $ν$$_8$ fundamental and the overlapping $ν$$_4$+$ν$$_8$-$ν$$_4$ hot bands using two methods. First, an empirical non-linear least square fit implemented in PGOPHER provides high-precision line assignment and spectroscopic constants, including accurate band origins, rotational constants, and quartic centrifugal distortion parameters, for the three isotopologues, covering rotational levels up to K$_a$ = 25 and J = 144, with an average RMS residual of 0.00037 cm$^{-1}$ (11.1 MHz). Compared with previously reported band parameters retrieved from a fit to narrowband (1.78 cm$^{-1}$) supersonically cooled spectra (B. E. Brumfield et al., J. Mol. Spectrosc., 2011, 266, 57-62), our fit provides much improved global agreement between measured and simulated spectra. In parallel, an ab initio-based effective Hamiltonian approach was used to model the complete rovibrational polyads, including weak hot-band transitions and polyad interactions inaccessible to purely empirical fits, and provided the first ab initio-based line intensities of CH$_2$Br$_2$ in the 8 $μ$m spectral region.

AI.tldr: 首次使用光频梳傅里叶变换光谱测量二溴甲烷在1180-1210 cm⁻¹区域的高分辨率吸收截面，解析了同位素特异性振转特征，并通过经验拟合和从头算方法建立了精确的光谱模型。
AI.motivation: 二溴甲烷在环境监测、工作场所安全和系外行星研究中的定量光谱检测受到缺乏准确吸收截面数据和严格光谱模型的限制。
AI.method: 使用光频梳傅里叶变换光谱技术测量1180-1210 cm⁻¹区域的高分辨率吸收截面，采用两种方法：1) 经验非线性最小二乘拟合（PGOPHER）提供精确谱线分配和光谱常数；2) 从头算有效哈密顿方法模拟完整振转多能级结构。
AI.result: 首次获得该区域高分辨率吸收截面数据，解析了三种同位素异构体的振转特征，经验拟合达到平均RMS残差0.00037 cm⁻¹，比先前研究有显著改进，并首次提供了该区域基于从头算的谱线强度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为二溴甲烷提供了精确的光谱数据和模型，填补了该分子在8 μm光谱区域的数据空白，为环境监测、安全检测和天体物理研究提供了重要工具。

title: Directional-dependent Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless transition at EuO/KTaO$_3$(111) interfaces
comment: A combined file including main text (21 pages, 4 figures) and Supplementary Information (29 pages, 11 figures). Accepted by Communications Physics
summary: In two dimensions, a phase-coherent superconducting state is established via a Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT) transition, whose critical temperature $T_{\rm BKT}$ is determined by the global superfluid stiffness in uniform superconducting systems. We report that at the interface between (111)-oriented KTaO$_3$ and ferromagnetic EuO, the two-dimensional superconducting state exhibits a BKT transition relying on the direction of in-plane bias current. The highest $T_{\rm BKT}$ occurs when current is applied along one of the [11$\bar{2}$] axes of KTaO$_3$, underscoring a spontaneous breaking of the threefold lattice rotational symmetry. Such directional dependence of $T_{\rm BKT}$ is consistently reflected in the nonreciprocal signals stemming from superconducting fluctuations above the transition. We attribute this phenomenon to an interfacial phase segregation; the phase with higher $T_{\rm BKT}$ self-organizes into quasi-one-dimensional textures that stretch along one of the [11$\bar{2}$] directions. Our results point toward the emergence of exotic phases of matter beyond the description of conventional BKT physics at a superconducting interface that is subjected to ferromagnetic proximity.

AI.tldr: 二维超导界面中BKT转变温度随电流方向变化，揭示自发晶格对称性破缺和准一维相分离
AI.motivation: 研究铁磁邻近效应下超导界面中的非常规物理现象，探索超越传统BKT物理的新奇物质相
AI.method: 在(111)取向KTaO₃与铁磁EuO界面制备二维超导系统，测量不同面内偏置电流方向下的BKT转变温度和非互易信号
AI.result: 发现BKT转变温度强烈依赖于电流方向，最高转变温度出现在沿[11$\bar{2}$]晶轴方向，表明三度晶格旋转对称性自发破缺；超导涨落区域也显示方向相关的非互易信号
AI.conclusion: 界面发生相分离，高转变温度相自组织成沿[11$\bar{2}$]方向的准一维结构，表明铁磁邻近效应下超导界面存在超越传统BKT物理的新奇物质相

title: Spatio-Temporal Uncertainty-Modulated Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Solving Hyperbolic Conservation Laws with Strong Shocks
summary: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) frequently encounter difficulties in accurately resolving shock waves within high-speed compressible flows, a failure largely attributed to the "gradient pathology" arising from extreme stiffness at discontinuities. To overcome this limitation, we propose the Spatio-Temporal Uncertainty-Modulated PINN (UM-PINN), a probabilistic framework that reinterprets the training process as a multi-task learning problem governed by homoscedastic aleatoric uncertainty. By integrating a gradient-based spatial mask with learnable variance parameters, our method dynamically balances the conflicting contributions of Partial Differential Equation (PDE) residuals and initial conditions across the spatiotemporal domain, further stabilized by Quasi-Monte Carlo Sobol sampling. We validate the framework against challenging benchmarks, including the one-dimensional (1D) Sod shock tube, the high-frequency Shu-Osher problem, and the complex two-dimensional (2D) Riemann interaction, where standard gradient-based weighting schemes typically fail. Experimental results demonstrate that UM-PINN achieves orders of magnitude improvement in accuracy and shock resolution compared to baseline methods, establishing a robust new paradigm for mesh-free Computational Fluid Dynamics in hyperbolic systems.

AI.tldr: UM-PINN：一种基于时空不确定性调制的PINN方法，通过概率框架和多任务学习解决激波捕捉问题，相比基线方法精度提升数个数量级。
AI.motivation: 传统PINN在处理高速可压缩流中的激波时存在困难，主要原因是激波间断处的"梯度病理"问题导致极端刚度，标准梯度加权方案通常失败。
AI.method: 提出时空不确定性调制PINN（UM-PINN），将训练过程重新解释为由同方差偶然不确定性控制的多任务学习问题。结合基于梯度的空间掩码和可学习方差参数，动态平衡PDE残差和初始条件在时空域中的冲突贡献，并通过准蒙特卡洛Sobol采样进行稳定。
AI.result: 在1D Sod激波管、高频Shu-Osher问题和复杂2D Riemann相互作用等挑战性基准测试中验证，UM-PINN相比基线方法在精度和激波分辨率上实现了数量级的改进。
AI.conclusion: UM-PINN为双曲系统中的无网格计算流体动力学建立了稳健的新范式，能够有效解决PINN在激波捕捉中的梯度病理问题。

title: Propagation-mediated amplification of \{11\={2}0\}-biased inversion domain boundary alignment in polarity-mixed GaN lateral overgrowth
summary: GaN polarity inversion and the associated inversion domain boundaries (IDBs) are frequently observed during lateral overgrowth and are often discussed in terms of the small energetic spread among competing IDB structures predicted by first-principles calculations. In circular mask openings, \(\{11\bar{2}0\}\)-aligned IDBs have previously been explained by geometric closure of a single-polarity hexagonal domain at the circular boundary. Here we examine an experimentally distinct regime in which opposite-polarity domains already coexist within the opening before the later development of long, straight IDB traces. In this mixed-polarity regime, the final trace orientation cannot be attributed solely to the macroscopic circular boundary. Nevertheless, plan-view SEM line-trace statistics show that IDB orientations remain biased toward the \(\{11\bar{2}0\}\) family. To quantify how this bias develops during propagation, we perform distance-resolved, length-weighted orientation analysis in concentric annular regions defined from the opening center. The resulting metrics show that \(\{11\bar{2}0\}\)-biased alignment is progressively amplified with propagation distance, while the orientation distribution becomes narrower, indicating systematic sharpening of the preferred alignment state. We further apply the same ring-resolved statistical operators to minimal two-domain propagation simulations in a circular opening and find that a propagation-mediated anisotropy reproduces the observed radial amplification under fixed circular geometry. Together, these results establish a quantitative phenomenology of \(\{11\bar{2}0\}\)-biased IDB alignment in polarity-mixed GaN lateral overgrowth on patterned sapphire and indicate that, although mask-boundary-imposed selection may describe single-polarity closure cases, the present mixed-polarity regime is better explained by propagation-mediated amplification.

AI.tldr: 研究GaN极性反转域界在混合极性条件下的取向偏好，发现{11¯20}取向偏差随传播距离增强，表明传播过程本身会放大取向选择，而非仅由圆形边界几何决定。
AI.motivation: 先前研究认为圆形掩模开口中{11¯20}取向的IDBs可由单极性六角域在圆形边界上的几何闭合解释。但实验中发现混合极性条件下，相反极性域在开口内已共存，最终IDB取向仍偏向{11¯20}家族，需要解释这种偏差如何发展。
AI.method: 1) 使用平面SEM线迹统计分析IDB取向分布；2) 在同心环形区域进行距离分辨、长度加权的取向分析；3) 将相同环分辨统计算子应用于圆形开口中的最小双域传播模拟。
AI.result: 1) IDB取向保持偏向{11¯20}家族；2) {11¯20}偏向对齐随传播距离逐渐放大，取向分布变窄；3) 传播介导的各向异性在固定圆形几何下能重现观察到的径向放大效应。
AI.conclusion: 建立了{11¯20}偏向IDB对齐的定量现象学，表明混合极性条件下IDB取向偏差主要由传播介导的放大机制解释，而非仅由掩模边界强加的选择。

title: Evidence of Metallic Wigner Crystal in Rhombohedral Graphene
summary: When the Coulomb interaction dominates over kinetic energy, electrons can crystallize into a Wigner crystal (WC). This paradigmatic correlated electronic phase has been realized in two-dimensional electron gases with parabolic band dispersion and completely flat Landau levels under high magnetic fields. Beyond these conventional contexts of electron crystallization, more exotic electron crystals have been postulated but remain unexplored. For example, a metallic Wigner crystal (mWC), in which itinerant carriers coexist with a pinned electron lattice, has been proposed theoretically but considered difficult to realize. Non-parabolic electron bands and quantum geometry may facilitate mWC and other novel topological electron crystals. Here we report transport evidence for WC and mWC in rhombohedral tetra-, penta-, and hexalayer graphene in the charge density range 0.3-0.5x10^12 cm^-2. By flattening the conduction band with a gate-controlled displacement field D, we observe an insulating state at nonzero charge density that shows nonlinear, hysteretic current-voltage relations, signatures of a pinned WC, that are absent from the lower-density insulator. Further increasing D reveals transport dominated by hole-like carriers with density up to only 15% of the nominal electron density, consistent with mWC. This mWC state is closely tied to the WC state, as both collapse simultaneously with increasing temperature or bias voltage. The mWC state shows quantum Hall onset near 0.4 T and disobeys the Streda relation, indicating compressible charge exchange between itinerant holes and the transport-inert WC background. Our results establish rhombohedral graphene as a platform for exploring novel electron crystals, as well as possible nontrivial topology, and new collective modes.

AI.tldr: 在菱面体多层石墨烯中通过门控位移场调控能带，首次实验观测到金属性维格纳晶体（mWC），其中巡游空穴与钉扎的电子晶格共存。
AI.motivation: 传统维格纳晶体（WC）已在二维电子气和朗道能级中实现，但理论上预言的金属性维格纳晶体（mWC）——巡游载流子与钉扎电子晶格共存的状态——一直未被实验证实。非抛物线能带和量子几何可能促进mWC等新型拓扑电子晶体的形成。
AI.method: 使用菱面体四、五、六层石墨烯，通过门控位移场D调控导带平坦度，在电荷密度0.3-0.5×10^12 cm^-2范围内进行输运测量。观测非线性、滞回电流-电压关系等钉扎WC特征，以及巡游空穴主导的输运行为。
AI.result: 1. 观测到非零电荷密度下的绝缘态，具有非线性滞回I-V关系，表明钉扎WC存在。2. 进一步增加D后，输运由密度仅为名义电子密度15%的空穴主导，符合mWC特征。3. mWC与WC在温度或偏压增加时同时崩溃。4. mWC在0.4T附近出现量子霍尔效应起始，违反Streda关系，表明巡游空穴与WC背景之间存在可压缩电荷交换。
AI.conclusion: 菱面体石墨烯为探索新型电子晶体（包括可能的非平凡拓扑和新集体模式）提供了平台，首次实验证实了金属性维格纳晶体的存在。

title: Dielectric response and viscosity due to dipolar interactions
summary: The dielectric response and viscosity are two fundamental properties of liquids that are usually treated separately. Here we show that in highly polar liquids the viscosity can be predicted directly from the dielectric function. We employ a stochastic field theory for thermal dipole-field dynamics coupled to hydrodynamic flow, and derive a very general Kubo relation for the response of an observable to the flow. We then use this to derive a Green-Kubo formula for the viscosity operator in terms of the correlation function for the body force, rather than the usual stress tensor formulation, and from this we derive the contribution to the viscosity due to dipolar interactions. In strongly polar liquids like water we show that viscous dissipation arising from these thermal van der Waals interactions is the dominant dissipative mechanism, leading to a direct connection between dielectric relaxation and viscosity. The theory also predicts the emergence of a second relaxation time in the dielectric response even when only a single microscopic relaxation mechanism is present. This additional timescale contributes to the intrinsic Debye relaxation and provides a natural explanation for the widespread empirical observation that many liquids require two relaxation times to fit their dielectric spectra. By establishing a predictive link between dielectric properties and viscosity, our results revisit classical ideas of liquid dynamics originating with Debye and suggest a practical route for identifying promising solvents for electrochemical energy storage.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了高极性液体中粘度与介电函数之间的直接预测关系，通过随机场理论建立了介电弛豫与粘度的理论联系。
AI.motivation: 传统上液体的介电响应和粘度被视为独立性质分别处理，该研究旨在揭示高极性液体中这两者之间的内在联系，重新审视德拜提出的经典液体动力学思想。
AI.method: 采用随机场理论描述热偶极子-场动力学与流体力学流动的耦合，推导了广义的Kubo关系，建立了基于体力的粘度算符Green-Kubo公式，并推导了偶极相互作用对粘度的贡献。
AI.result: 在强极性液体（如水）中，热范德华相互作用产生的粘性耗散是主要耗散机制，介电弛豫与粘度存在直接联系。理论还预测即使只有一个微观弛豫机制，介电响应中也会出现第二个弛豫时间。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了介电性质与粘度之间的预测性联系，为理解液体动力学提供了新视角，并为电化学储能中寻找理想溶剂提供了实用途径。

title: Excitations across the equilibrium and photoinduced `hidden' states of magnetoresistive manganites
summary: "Hidden" phases, generated using ultrafast laser pulses (few hundred femtoseconds), with properties distinct from thermodynamic equilibrium, are appealing for technologies because they can be long-lived, with lifetimes of hours or weeks, and reversible with temperature sweeping or extra pulses. In this regard, La$_{2/3}$Ca$_{1/3}$MnO$_3$ (LCMO) stands out due to its tunability through epitaxial strain, which can drive the bulk ferromagnetic metal (FMM) into an antiferromagnetic insulator (AFI), and its susceptibility to photo-induced transitions. Indeed, AFI LCMO displays a long-lived photo-induced transition into a putative 'hidden' phase whose exact nature and excitations are still largely unknown. Here, we combine ultrafast photo-excitation in the near infrared with in situ transport, x-ray absorption (XAS), and Resonant Inelastic X-ray Scattering (RIXS) to investigate the excitations (polarons, phonons, and orbital) of the photo-excited phase of LCMO and contrast them with the thermodynamic phases achieved through strain and temperature. In the thermodynamic regime, we establish the correlation between polarons and transport, placing them in the 'strong coupling' regime of the Holstein model. Upon photo-excitation of LCMO-AFI, we uncover a long-lived phase characterized by the softening of the polaron excitations, the partial suppression of the Jahn-Teller distortion, and nearly unchanged phonons, showing the emergence of a photo-excited state absent in the equilibrium phase diagram. Finally, by varying temperature, epitaxial strain, and photo-excitation fluence, we construct a polaron phase diagram and identify the key spectroscopic signatures of each phase. Our laser-RIXS approach establishes a versatile platform for exploring photo-induced 'hidden' phases in quantum materials in non-stroboscopic conditions.

AI.tldr: 利用超快激光脉冲在La2/3Ca1/3MnO3中诱导出长寿命的"隐藏"相，通过激光-RIXS技术揭示了该相中极化子软化、Jahn-Teller畸变部分抑制等特征，建立了极化子相图。
AI.motivation: 研究超快激光诱导的"隐藏"相在量子材料中具有重要技术应用潜力，但La2/3Ca1/3MnO3中这种相的性质和激发态仍不清楚，需要深入探索其微观机制。
AI.method: 结合超快近红外光激发与原位输运测量、X射线吸收谱(XAS)和共振非弹性X射线散射(RIXS)，对比应变和温度调控的热力学相，分析极化子、声子和轨道激发。
AI.result: 在热力学相中建立了极化子与输运的强关联；光激发LCMO-AFI产生了长寿命相，其特征是极化子软化、Jahn-Teller畸变部分抑制而声子基本不变；通过调控温度、应变和光激发强度构建了极化子相图。
AI.conclusion: 激光-RIXS方法为非频闪条件下探索量子材料中的光诱导"隐藏"相建立了通用平台，揭示了光激发相在平衡相图中不存在的新状态。

title: Reliable and Efficient Automated Transition-State Searches with Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials
summary: Transition-state searches are central to understanding reaction mechanisms, but the high computational cost of density-functional theory (DFT) limits their application in high-throughput catalyst and materials discovery. Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) offer near-DFT accuracy at orders-of-magnitude lower cost, yet their reliability for transition-state searches remains underexplored. Here, we systematically benchmark hybrid transition-state-search workflows combining six freely available potentials (MACE-OMol25, UMA-Small, UMA-Medium, eSEN-S, AIMNet2, and GFN2-xTB) with two reaction-path-finding algorithms (the freezing-string method and climbing-image nudged elastic band) across 58 diverse reactions spanning small organics, polymerization chemistry, and transition-metal catalysis. We find that models trained on the Open Molecules 2025 dataset exhibit markedly superior performance, with MACE-OMol25 achieving a 96.6% success rate while requiring fewer than four DFT-gradient evaluations per reaction on organic systems - a 94-96% reduction compared to conventional DFT-based searches. Low-level refinement on the MLIP surface before high-level DFT optimization reduces computational cost three-fold with minimal loss in reliability. For transition-metal systems, UMA-Medium demonstrates promising transferability to in-distribution transition metal complex reactions and out-of-distribution organometallic C-H activation. These results establish MLIP-accelerated workflows as practical tools for automated reaction discovery, enabling near-DFT accuracy at a fraction of traditional expense.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了六种机器学习原子间势能函数与两种反应路径搜索算法在58个多样化反应中的表现，发现基于Open Molecules 2025数据集训练的模型（特别是MACE-OMol25）在有机系统中达到96.6%成功率，计算成本降低94-96%，为自动化反应发现提供了实用工具。
AI.motivation: 密度泛函理论（DFT）计算成本高昂，限制了其在过渡态搜索和高通量催化剂发现中的应用。机器学习原子间势能（MLIPs）虽然能以低得多的成本提供接近DFT的精度，但其在过渡态搜索中的可靠性尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 系统性地基准测试了六种免费可用的势能函数（MACE-OMol25、UMA-Small、UMA-Medium、eSEN-S、AIMNet2和GFN2-xTB）与两种反应路径寻找算法（冻结弦方法和爬升像微动弹性带法）的组合，覆盖58个多样化反应，包括小分子有机反应、聚合化学和过渡金属催化。
AI.result: 基于Open Molecules 2025数据集训练的模型表现显著优越，MACE-OMol25在有机系统中达到96.6%成功率，每个反应仅需不到4次DFT梯度评估（相比传统DFT搜索降低94-96%）。在MLIP表面上进行低级别精炼后再进行高级别DFT优化，可将计算成本降低三倍而可靠性损失最小。对于过渡金属系统，UMA-Medium在分布内过渡金属配合物反应和分布外有机金属C-H活化中表现出良好的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: MLIP加速的工作流程可作为自动化反应发现的实用工具，以传统成本的一小部分实现接近DFT的精度，为高通量催化剂和材料发现开辟了新途径。

title: Improving YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{7-δ}$ annealing times through a combining-temperatures route
summary: The oxygenation process at constant temperature of YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{7-δ}$ (YBCO) was systematically investigated in the temperature range from 300 $^o$C to 800 $^o$C. With this purpose, fully deoxygenated powder samples was exposed to an oxygen saturated atmosphere, and the evolution of their mass was recorded as a function of time using a thermogravimetric balance. Results reveal a strong dependence of both: the oxygenation kinetics and the final oxygen saturation level, on the temperature used for oxygenation. Moreover, results show that higher oxygen temperatures promote faster oxygen absorption but lead to lower saturation levels (higher final $δ$ values), whereas lower oxygen temperatures result in slower kinetics but enable the system to approach better oxygenation conditions in order to improve the final superconducting properties of the material. In addition to our measurements, a comparative analysis between oxygenation levels at the oxygen temperatures under study was performed in the range around oxygen saturation ($δ$ $<$ 0.3). Consequently, an oxygenation protocol based on a combination of several oxygenation temperatures is proposed. As a first approach, results from a protocol with just two different oxygenation temperatures is compared with results coming from using just one oxygenation temperature. Outstandingly, a protocol with a first oxygenation step at high temperatures and a second one at low temperatures demonstrates to improve oxygenation times in near a 30 \% for reaching $δ$ values below 0.1 and in near a 60 \% for reaching $δ$ values around 0.12. Finally, we trust that our results are of direct application on industry since size of grain used herein are in scales of typical thickness of superconductor tapes.

AI.tldr: 研究YBa₂Cu₃O₇₋δ材料在300-800°C温度范围内的恒温氧化过程，发现高温促进快速吸氧但饱和水平低，低温氧化慢但能达到更好氧化状态。提出结合高低温度的两步氧化协议，可显著缩短达到特定δ值的时间。
AI.motivation: 研究YBCO超导材料的氧化动力学，以优化其氧化工艺，提高材料的超导性能。由于氧化过程对最终超导性能至关重要，需要系统研究温度对氧化动力学和最终氧饱和度的影响。
AI.method: 使用热重分析天平，将完全脱氧的YBCO粉末样品暴露在氧饱和气氛中，在300-800°C温度范围内记录质量随时间的变化，系统研究恒温氧化过程。特别关注δ<0.3的氧饱和度区域，并比较单温度和双温度氧化协议的效果。
AI.result: 结果显示氧化动力学和最终氧饱和度强烈依赖于氧化温度：高温促进快速吸氧但导致较低的饱和水平（较高的最终δ值），低温氧化慢但能使系统接近更好的氧化条件。提出的两步氧化协议（先高温后低温）可将达到δ<0.1的时间缩短约30%，达到δ≈0.12的时间缩短约60%。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合高低温度的两步氧化协议可以显著优化YBCO材料的氧化工艺，缩短处理时间同时改善最终氧化状态。由于使用的晶粒尺寸与典型超导带材厚度相当，该结果具有直接的工业应用价值。

title: Towards Verifiable and Self-Correcting AI Physicists for Quantum Many-Body Simulations
summary: Recent advances in automated scientific discovery have shown remarkable promise across frontier research domains, with agent systems driven by large language models (LLMs) emerging as powerful tools for physics research. However, in practical applications, LLM scientific research is prone to hallucinations, highlighting the need for reliable verification and error-correction mechanisms. Here we introduce PhysVEC, an automated multi-agent framework for verifiable and error-correcting AI-driven physics research. PhysVEC incorporates a programming verifier and a scientific verifier to ensure both coding correctness and physical validity, and provides human-auditable evidence at each stage. We curate QMB100, an end-to-end research-level benchmark dataset consisting of $100$ tasks extracted from $21$ high impact articles that focus on quantum many-body physics. We evaluated PhysVEC with four frontier LLMs and found that it significantly outperformed baselines in both programming tests and scientific tests across all LLMs and task categories. PhysVEC demonstrates effective inference-time scaling and delivers accurate physical predictions through integrated verification and error-correction mechanisms, paving the way for reliable and interpretable AI physicists.

AI.tldr: PhysVEC是一个用于可验证和错误纠正的AI驱动物理研究的多智能体框架，包含编程验证器和科学验证器，在量子多体物理任务上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于大语言模型的智能体系统在物理研究中显示出潜力，但在实际应用中容易出现幻觉，需要可靠的验证和错误纠正机制。
AI.method: 提出PhysVEC框架，包含编程验证器和科学验证器来确保编码正确性和物理有效性，每个阶段都提供人类可审计的证据。使用从21篇高影响力文章中提取的100个任务构建QMB100基准数据集。
AI.result: 在四个前沿大语言模型上评估PhysVEC，发现在所有模型和任务类别中，编程测试和科学测试都显著优于基线方法。PhysVEC展示了有效的推理时间扩展，并通过集成验证和错误纠正机制提供准确的物理预测。
AI.conclusion: PhysVEC为可靠和可解释的AI物理学家铺平了道路，通过验证和错误纠正机制确保AI驱动物理研究的可靠性。

title: Stress Asymmetry in Hard Magnetic Soft Materials
summary: Hard magnetic soft materials -- soft polymers embedded with hard magnetic particles -- are modeled using continuum magnetomechanical formulations in which the deformation and the magnetization field are the primary kinematic variables. A recent question in such formulations is whether the Cauchy stress is symmetric, which is directly related to frame invariance and angular momentum balance. This note discusses energetically equivalent formulations, related by a change of variables between referential and current descriptions of the magnetization, and shows that they generally yield different Cauchy stresses, including a change in their symmetry. Specifically, the formulation based on a referential magnetization produces a symmetric Cauchy stress, while that based on a current magnetization generally yields an asymmetric Cauchy stress. We highlight that when the internal variable (magnetization field) is at the energy-minimizing equilibrium configuration, the divergences of these stresses are the same, and both stresses are symmetric.

AI.tldr: 硬磁软材料中基于参考磁化和当前磁化的两种能量等效公式会产生不同的柯西应力对称性
AI.motivation: 探讨硬磁软材料连续介质磁力学模型中柯西应力的对称性问题，这直接关系到框架不变性和角动量平衡
AI.method: 分析基于参考磁化和当前磁化的两种能量等效公式，通过变量变换研究它们对柯西应力对称性的影响
AI.result: 基于参考磁化的公式产生对称柯西应力，而基于当前磁化的公式通常产生不对称柯西应力；当磁化场处于能量最小化平衡配置时，两种应力的散度相同且都对称
AI.conclusion: 两种能量等效公式在柯西应力对称性上存在差异，但在磁化场达到平衡状态时收敛到相同结果，这澄清了硬磁软材料建模中的应力对称性问题

title: A footprint of zero-point entropy in higher-temperature magnetic thermodynamics
summary: Identifying extensively degenerate zero-temperature states is key in characterizing spin-liquid-candidate materials and spin ices. In experiments, finding zero-point entropy (ZPE) is often attempted by measuring the entropy released by a material when cooled down from very high to very low temperatures. Such investigations are often unreliable and lead to controversial results because accessible temperatures may be insufficient to accurately capture essential low- and high-temperature features of magnetic materials. The purpose of this paper is to point out a simple, easily accessible signature of nonzero ZPE: the Maxwell's relation $\left(\partial S/\partial H\right)_T = \left(\partial M/\partial T\right)_H$ can appear violated if a vanishing ZPE is assumed incorrectly. This relation can further be used for estimating the ZPE. In many materials below characteristic temperatures, the criterion of non-vanishing ZPE has a particularly simple form: $\left(\frac{\partial C}{\partial H}\right)_T\left(\frac{\partial M}{\partial T}\right)_H<0$. We discuss these effects and the ZPE signature in the benchmark test case of the well-studied spin ice $Dy_2Ti_2O_7$.

AI.tldr: 论文提出通过麦克斯韦关系检验零点熵的存在性，为识别自旋液体候选材料和自旋冰提供新方法
AI.motivation: 传统通过测量材料从高温到低温释放的熵来确定零点熵的方法不可靠，因为可达到的温度范围可能无法准确捕捉磁性材料的关键低温/高温特征，导致争议性结果
AI.method: 利用麦克斯韦关系(∂S/∂H)_T = (∂M/∂T)_H，如果错误假设零点熵为零，该关系会表现出违反现象。在特征温度以下，非零零点熵的判据简化为(∂C/∂H)_T(∂M/∂T)_H < 0
AI.result: 该方法为识别零点熵提供了简单易行的实验特征，并可用于估算零点熵的大小。以Dy₂Ti₂O₇自旋冰为基准测试案例进行了讨论
AI.conclusion: 麦克斯韦关系的违反可作为非零零点熵的明确实验特征，为自旋液体候选材料和自旋冰的研究提供了更可靠的诊断工具

title: Crystals Caught Doping: Metallic Wigner Crystals in Rhombohedral Graphene
summary: Nearly a century after Wigner's initial proposal, electron crystals are now a topic of intense experimental and theoretical interest. However, most proposed crystalline phases are commensurate and therefore become insulating in the presence of even weak pinning. In this work we discuss when a commensurate Wigner crystal will spontaneously self dope and develop itinerant carriers, giving rise to an incommensurate and thus metallic Wigner crystal (MWC). We develop a general criterion for the instability of the commensurate crystal which involves the competition between the charge gap at commensurability and a ``packing bias'' whose sign selects whether electron or hole doping is preferred. We then apply these insights to rhombohedral multilayer graphene, where calculations for commensurate crystals reveal instabilities towards self-doping. Carrying out self-consistent Hartree-Fock over the landscape of incommensurate crystals reveals the phase diagram, where a broad MWC phase appears directly adjacent to an insulating Wigner crystal phase. Recent observations of an island of reversed Hall conductance near a putative Wigner crystal phase in rhombohedral graphene are naturally explained by our theory.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种金属性维格纳晶体（MWC）理论，解释了当维格纳晶体发生自掺杂时，会从不导电的绝缘态转变为导电的金属态。
AI.motivation: 传统维格纳晶体大多是公度的，在弱钉扎下会变成绝缘体。研究者希望探索在什么条件下公度维格纳晶体会自发掺杂并产生巡游载流子，形成非公度的金属性维格纳晶体。
AI.method: 提出了判断公度晶体不稳定性的通用判据，涉及电荷间隙与"堆积偏置"的竞争。然后将这些见解应用于菱面体多层石墨烯，通过自洽Hartree-Fock计算研究非公度晶体的相图。
AI.result: 计算显示公度晶体存在自掺杂不稳定性。相图显示金属性维格纳晶体（MWC）相直接邻接绝缘维格纳晶体相，这解释了最近在菱面体石墨烯中观察到的霍尔电导反转现象。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了金属性维格纳晶体的理论框架，解释了维格纳晶体从绝缘态到金属态的转变机制，为实验观察提供了理论支持。

title: Self-similar summation of virial expansions
summary: Virial expansions are the series in powers of density assumed to be small. However, the equations of state require to consider finite densities for which virial expansions, as a rule, diverge. In order to extrapolate a virial expansion to the values, where this expansion diverges, one uses summation methods. The most often used method is the Padé summation, which has several deficiencies. First of all, Padé approximants are not uniquely defined, suggesting a large table of admissible variants. Second, often there appear spurious unphysical poles. On the contrary, in those cases where the existence of a pole is physically motivated, Padé approximants do not necessarily exhibit it. A new approach for the summation of virial expansions is suggested, based on self-similar approximation theory. The method is regular and uniquely defined. It allows for the determination of physically motivated poles. The accuracy of self-similar approximants is not worse than that of the best Padé approximants with fitting parameters or of Monte Carlo simulations. The self-similar summation is based solely on virial expansions, involving no fitting parameters. In some cases, self-similar summation allows for reconstructing the sought functions exactly. The approach is illustrated by summing virial expansions for hard-disk fluids, hard-sphere fluids, and systems with power-law potentials.

AI.tldr: 提出基于自相似逼近理论的新方法，用于对发散维里展开进行求和，克服传统Padé逼近的缺陷
AI.motivation: 维里展开在有限密度下通常发散，传统Padé求和存在多解性、虚假极点等问题，需要更可靠的方法
AI.method: 基于自相似逼近理论，建立正则且唯一确定的求和方案，无需拟合参数，能准确识别物理极点
AI.result: 自相似逼近的精度不低于带拟合参数的最佳Padé逼近或蒙特卡洛模拟，某些情况下能精确重构目标函数
AI.conclusion: 自相似求和为维里展开提供了一种优于Padé逼近的替代方法，具有唯一性、正则性和物理合理性

title: The multichannel Dyson equation for double ionisation spectroscopies
summary: Several photoemission spectroscopies and, in particular, Auger spectroscopy, involve double-ionization processes. For the numerical simulation of these spectroscopies it is convenient to use the particle-particle channel of the two-body Green's functions since its poles correspond to excitation energies in which the final state has two more particles (holes or electrons) than the initial state. In standard approaches it is approximated within the random phase approximation. As a consequence only the quasiparticles of the photoemission spectrum are captured but none of the satellites features. In this work, we go beyond this approximation by employing the multichannel Dyson equation. By coupling the particle-particle two-body Green's function to the 3-hole-1-electron and 3-electron-1-hole channels of the four-body Green's function, the multichannel Dyson equation incorporates correlations beyond the RPA in a straightforward way. We are thus able to describe both quasiparticles and satellites in the photoemission spectra.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用多通道Dyson方程超越RPA近似，通过耦合粒子-粒子二体格林函数与四体格林函数的3空穴-1电子和3电子-1空穴通道，能够同时描述光电子能谱中的准粒子和卫星峰。
AI.motivation: 传统方法使用随机相位近似(RPA)只能捕捉光电子能谱中的准粒子特征，无法描述卫星峰。需要超越RPA近似来同时描述准粒子和卫星特征。
AI.method: 采用多通道Dyson方程，将粒子-粒子二体格林函数与四体格林函数的3空穴-1电子和3电子-1空穴通道耦合，从而在RPA基础上纳入更多相关效应。
AI.result: 该方法能够同时描述光电子能谱中的准粒子和卫星峰特征，超越了传统RPA近似的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 多通道Dyson方程为双电离过程的光电子能谱模拟提供了更精确的理论框架，能够全面描述准粒子和卫星特征。

title: Stochastic GW with the Orthogonalized Projector Augmented Wave Method
summary: We introduce stochastic GW with the orthogonalized projector augmented-wave method (OPAW-sGW). This implementation enables accurate quasiparticle band gaps on significantly coarser real-space grids than norm-conserving pseudopotential sGW (NCPP-sGW). The orthogonalized PAW representation preserves the formal all-electron character and enables stochastic sampling of the Green's function and screened Coulomb interaction.

AI.tldr: 提出了基于正交化投影缀加波方法的随机GW方法（OPAW-sGW），相比传统范数守恒赝势sGW，能在更粗的实空间网格上获得精确的准粒子带隙
AI.motivation: 传统随机GW方法（NCPP-sGW）需要精细的实空间网格才能获得精确结果，计算成本高。正交化投影缀加波方法能保持全电子特性，有望在更粗网格上实现精确计算
AI.method: 结合正交化投影缀加波（OPAW）与随机GW方法，通过正交化PAW表示保持形式上的全电子特性，实现对格林函数和屏蔽库仑相互作用的随机采样
AI.result: OPAW-sGW相比NCPP-sGW能在显著更粗的实空间网格上获得精确的准粒子带隙，提高了计算效率
AI.conclusion: OPAW-sGW方法结合了正交化PAW和随机GW的优势，为高效精确的电子结构计算提供了新途径

title: Emergent superconductivity at 16.3 K in an altermagnetic candidate Na$_{2-x}$V$_2$Se$_2$O with broken inversion symmetry
summary: Altermagnets (AMs), characterized by zero net magnetization and momentum-dependent spin splitting, are anticipated to hold significant potential for generating multiple exotic and uncommon superconducting states. However, superconductivity has not yet been realized in AMs to date. Recently, two-dimensional (2D) V$_2$Ch$_2$O (Ch = Se, Te) monolayers, as well as AV$_2$Ch$_2$O (A = K, Rb, Cs) crystals containing [V$_2$Ch$_2$O]$^{δ-}$ building layers, have been predicted and/or demonstrated to be promising altermagnetic materials. Our preliminary attempts to explore superconductivity in these materials by applying pressure or chemical doping were unsuccessful. Here we report the discovery of superconductivity at a relatively high transition temperature of ~ 16.3 K in a newly synthesized layered compound, Na$_{2-x}$V$_2$Se$_2$O, a variant of AV$_2$Ch$_2$O. In this structure, the [V$_2$Ch$_2$O]$^{δ-}$ layers are interspersed with double layers of Na$^+$ instead of a single layer of A$^+$, with sodium sites being only half-filled. This new family of layered vanadium oxychalcogenides, lacking inversion symmetry, represents an intriguing platform for exploring altermagnetic superconductors, and holds the potential to reveal novel phenomena, such as topological states, van Hove singularities, and finite-momentum superconductivity. Furthermore, this material acts as a "bridge" between the cuprate/nickelate and iron-pnictide high temperature superconductors, providing new hope and opportunity to expand the category of layered superconductors with higher critical temperatures (T$_c$) and enhancing our understanding of the underlying mechanisms in these systems.

AI.tldr: 在新型层状化合物Na₂₋ₓV₂Se₂O中首次实现了反铁磁超导，转变温度约16.3K，为探索反铁磁超导体提供了新平台
AI.motivation: 反铁磁体具有零净磁化和动量依赖的自旋分裂特性，有望产生多种奇异超导态，但此前尚未在反铁磁体中实现超导。AV₂Ch₂O系列材料被预测为有前景的反铁磁材料，但之前的压力或化学掺杂尝试均未成功。
AI.method: 合成新型层状化合物Na₂₋ₓV₂Se₂O，这是AV₂Ch₂O系列的一个变体。该结构中[V₂Ch₂O]ᵟ⁻层被双层Na⁺离子隔开，而非单层A⁺离子，且钠位点仅半填充。
AI.result: 在Na₂₋ₓV₂Se₂O中发现了相对较高的超导转变温度~16.3K，这是首次在反铁磁材料中实现超导。该材料缺乏反演对称性，为探索反铁磁超导体提供了新平台。
AI.conclusion: 新型层状钒氧硫族化合物代表了探索反铁磁超导体的有趣平台，有望揭示拓扑态、van Hove奇点和有限动量超导等新现象。该材料还充当了铜酸盐/镍酸盐和铁基高温超导体之间的"桥梁"，为扩展具有更高临界温度的层状超导体类别提供了新希望。

title: Geometry-informed neural atlas for boundary value problems of complex 3D geometries
summary: When three-dimensional bodies contain thin features, non-trivial topology, or scan-derived surfaces, volumetric meshing can become the dominant bottleneck in simulation workflows. We replace this step with a learned geometric representation: overlapping volumetric coordinate charts, each equipped with a neural decoder and Jacobian, trained from point-cloud or level-set data to form a differentiable atlas. Governing equations are pulled back to chart-local reference coordinates via the Piola identity, and local solutions are coupled through multiplicative Schwarz iterations on the overlap graph. Because the atlas is constructed independently of the downstream discretization, one frozen geometric substrate can support fundamentally different solvers (for example, a meshfree physics-informed neural network and a conventional finite-element method) without re-meshing or re-parametrization. Benchmark and verification studies show that the learned atlas preserves expected finite-element convergence behavior and enables both forward and inverse analyses on geometries that would otherwise require solver-specific volumetric meshing.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于学习的几何表示方法，使用重叠的体积坐标图表和神经解码器替代传统体积网格划分，支持多种求解器而无需重新网格化。
AI.motivation: 当三维物体包含薄特征、非平凡拓扑或扫描表面时，体积网格划分成为仿真工作流的主要瓶颈。传统方法需要为不同求解器重新网格化，效率低下。
AI.method: 构建学习的几何表示：重叠的体积坐标图表，每个图表配备神经解码器和雅可比矩阵，从点云或水平集数据训练形成可微分图集。通过Piola恒等式将控制方程拉回到图表局部参考坐标，并通过重叠图上的乘法Schwarz迭代耦合局部解。
AI.result: 学习的图集保持了预期的有限元收敛行为，能够在原本需要求解器特定体积网格划分的几何上进行正向和逆向分析。一个冻结的几何基板可以支持本质上不同的求解器（如无网格物理信息神经网络和传统有限元方法）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过学习的几何表示替代传统体积网格划分，解决了复杂几何仿真中的瓶颈问题，实现了求解器无关的几何表示，提高了仿真工作流的效率和灵活性。

title: Spatially modulated morphotropic phase boundaries in a compressively strained multiferroic thin film
summary: The coexisting rhombohedral-like (R', MA) and tetragonal-like (T', MC) monoclinic phases in compressively strained bismuth ferrite thin films exhibit exceptional piezoelectric and magnetic properties. While previous studies have largely focused on probing the morphotropic phase boundaries (MPBs) comprising ordered R'/T' twins, their self-organizing structures remain not fully explored. Here, we observed two types of interphase boundaries in a 60 nm-thick BiFeO3 film epitaxially grown on a LaAlO3 substrate by employing multi-modal diffraction-based electron microscopy. First, the flat MPBs form lines extending >1 mm, and repeat almost every ~20 um. Additionally, we uncover a new type of phase boundary with zig-zag regions of alternating R'/R' and T'/T' twin domains. Cross-sectional multislice electron ptychography confirms the atomic-scale polarization rotation across the MPB, with out-of-plane strain varying >15%. Plan-view electron backscatter diffraction reveals the lattice disclination of ~1.5-degrees across the zig-zag interphase boundaries, while having >2.5 degrees within the MPB. Phase-field modeling suggests that the formation of zig-zag phase boundaries arises from balancing between Landau and elastic energies. We speculate that such well-ordered interphase boundaries are associated with mesoscale in-plane strain modulations, thus providing a way to engineer and harness their properties for potential device applications.

AI.tldr: 在压缩应变BiFeO3薄膜中观察到两种相界：平坦的MPB线和新型锯齿状相界，揭示了原子尺度极化旋转和晶格位错，相场模拟表明其形成源于Landau能与弹性能的平衡。
AI.motivation: 虽然压缩应变BiFeO3薄膜中的R'和T'单斜相具有优异的压电和磁性能，但先前研究主要关注有序R'/T'孪晶构成的MPB，其自组织结构尚未完全探索。
AI.method: 采用多模态衍射电子显微镜研究60nm厚BiFeO3薄膜，包括横截面多层电子ptychography确认原子尺度极化旋转，平面电子背散射衍射揭示晶格位错，并结合相场模拟分析形成机制。
AI.result: 观察到两种相界：平坦MPB线延伸>1mm，每~20μm重复；新型锯齿状相界由交替R'/R'和T'/T'孪晶域组成。MPB处面外应变变化>15%，锯齿状相界晶格位错约1.5度，MPB内>2.5度。
AI.conclusion: 锯齿状相界的形成源于Landau能与弹性能的平衡，这种有序相界与中尺度面内应变调制相关，为工程化调控其性能用于潜在器件应用提供了途径。

title: Dielectric control of ultrafast carrier dynamics and transport in graphene
summary: Understanding the ultrafast dynamics of photoexcited charges in graphene is essential, as the microscopic mechanisms underlying these dynamics determine many of graphene's optical, optothermal, and optoelectronic properties. These are crucial properties for many functionalities and devices enabled by graphene, such as high-speed photodectors. Therefore, beyond scientific understanding, it is highly desirable to control ultrafast carrier dynamics for practical applications. Here, we establish this control by engineering the dielectric environment of graphene, thereby regulating both heating and cooling dynamics without altering the Fermi energy, optical power, or ambient temperature. By combining optical pump-terahertz probe experiments with theoretical calculations, we show that dielectric screening suppresses carrier-carrier interactions and slows the dynamics. In particular, reduced carrier-carrier scattering delays the formation of a quasi-equilibrium hot electron distribution, thus slowing carrier heating. It also slows carrier cooling because re-thermalization after optical-phonon emission depends on the same interactions. The enhanced screening further reduces the energy of electron-hole puddles, thereby increasing charge mobility and the Seebeck coefficient. This ability to externally control internal graphene dynamics and transport properties enables the optimization of device performance, such as the sensitivity of photodetectors for data communication and wireless communication applications.

AI.tldr: 通过调控石墨烯的介电环境，可以控制超快载流子动力学而不改变费米能级、光功率或环境温度，从而优化光电探测器性能
AI.motivation: 理解石墨烯中超快光激发电荷的动力学对于其光学、光热和光电特性至关重要，这些特性决定了石墨烯在高速光电探测器等功能器件中的性能。除了科学理解外，控制超快载流子动力学对于实际应用也极为重要。
AI.method: 通过工程化调控石墨烯的介电环境，结合光学泵浦-太赫兹探测实验和理论计算，研究介电屏蔽对载流子动力学的影响。
AI.result: 介电屏蔽抑制了载流子-载流子相互作用，减慢了动力学过程：1）减少载流子-载流子散射延迟了准平衡热电子分布的形成，减慢了载流子加热；2）减慢了载流子冷却，因为光学声子发射后的再热化依赖于相同的相互作用；3）增强的屏蔽进一步降低了电子-空穴池的能量，提高了电荷迁移率和塞贝克系数。
AI.conclusion: 通过外部调控石墨烯的介电环境，可以实现对其内部动力学和输运特性的控制，从而优化器件性能，特别是在数据通信和无线通信应用中的光电探测器灵敏度。

title: Unified Gauge-Geometry Symmetry for Equilibrium Statistical Mechanics
summary: We present a symmetry-based framework for equilibrium statistical mechanics that formulates a single Lie group combining conventional spacetime symmetries with a recently identified phase-space gauge-shifting invariance [Muller et al., Phys. Rev. Lett. 133, 217101 (2024)]. Using Noether's theorem, we obtain a set of general Ward identities together with previously unexplored cross-relations arising from the noncommutation of different symmetry generators. The approach extends standard many-body symmetries, such as translations, rotations, Galilean boosts, dilations, and particle exchange, by incorporating an internal gauge-shift symmetry within a unified group structure. The resulting Lie algebra suggests a hierarchy of exact identities that encompass established sum rules and indicate possible cross-coupling relations between distinct response and correlation functions. We also identify a Wigner-Eckart-Ward reduction that simplifies tensor-hyperforce correlators to two scalar radial spectra in isotropic fluids, and we outline an equivariant gauge-constrained DFT formulation whose Euler-Lagrange equations are constructed to satisfy the corresponding Ward and cross-Ward constraints. This framework provides a consistent organizational basis for phenomena in liquids, mixtures, and interfaces, and may offer a symmetry-based perspective connecting structure, mechanics, and dynamics in many-body systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于对称性的平衡统计力学框架，将传统时空对称性与相空间规范平移不变性统一为单一李群，推导出广义Ward恒等式和交叉关系，为多体系统提供一致的组织基础。
AI.motivation: 传统统计力学中的对称性处理较为分散，缺乏统一框架。作者希望将常规时空对称性与新发现的相空间规范平移不变性整合，建立更全面的对称性理论，以更好地理解多体系统的结构、力学和动力学关系。
AI.method: 1. 构建单一李群，结合传统时空对称性（平移、旋转、伽利略提升、膨胀、粒子交换）与相空间规范平移不变性；2. 应用诺特定理推导广义Ward恒等式；3. 利用对称生成元非对易性获得交叉关系；4. 提出Wigner-Eckart-Ward约化简化张量-超力关联函数；5. 构建等变规范约束密度泛函理论（DFT）框架。
AI.result: 1. 获得包含已知求和规则的分层精确恒等式；2. 发现不同响应和关联函数之间可能的交叉耦合关系；3. 在各项同性流体中将张量-超力关联函数简化为两个标量径向谱；4. 建立满足Ward和交叉Ward约束的等变规范约束DFT方程。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为液体、混合物和界面现象提供了一致的组织基础，可能为多体系统的结构、力学和动力学关系提供基于对称性的新视角，统一了传统对称性与新发现的规范不变性。

title: Electronic structure and correlation of La$_4$Co$_2$NiO$_8$Cl$_2$: a theoretical proposal for a La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$-like high-temperature superconductor
summary: Based on the discovery of high-temperature superconductivity in the bilayer nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, several Co-based La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$-like materials were theoretically predicted as possible high-temperature superconductors by electron doping. Motivated by these findings and the subsequent discovery of superconductivity in the trilayer nickelate La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$ under high pressure, we propose and investigate a Co-based La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$-like material. With electron doping to the high-pressure trilayer cobaltate La$_4$Co$_3$O$_{10}$, using density functional theory combined with dynamical mean-field theory (DFT+DMFT), we find that the resulting compound La$_4$Co$_2$NiO$_8$Cl$_2$ exhibits a crystal structure and a strongly correlated electronic structure similar to those of La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$ under high pressure. This suggests that this new compound may host high-temperature superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种新型钴基材料La₄Co₂NiO₈Cl₂，通过电子掺杂高压三层钴酸盐La₄Co₃O₁₀，其结构和电子性质与高压下的La₄Ni₃O₁₀相似，可能具有高温超导性。
AI.motivation: 受到双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇高温超导性和三层镍酸盐La₄Ni₃O₁₀高压超导性的启发，研究人员希望探索钴基类似材料作为潜在的高温超导体。
AI.method: 使用密度泛函理论结合动力学平均场理论（DFT+DMFT）对电子掺杂后的高压三层钴酸盐La₄Co₃O₁₀进行计算研究，提出新型化合物La₄Co₂NiO₈Cl₂。
AI.result: 计算表明La₄Co₂NiO₈Cl₂具有与高压下La₄Ni₃O₁₀相似的晶体结构和强关联电子结构，这暗示该新材料可能具有高温超导性。
AI.conclusion: 通过电子掺杂设计的钴基La₄Co₂NiO₈Cl₂化合物在结构和电子性质上与高压镍酸盐超导体相似，为探索新型高温超导材料提供了有前景的方向。

title: Role of anisotropic electronic friction in laser-driven hydrogen recombination on copper
summary: Ultrafast light-driven chemical dynamics at surfaces are governed by energy transfer from excited electrons to vibrational degrees of freedom. When this nonadiabatic energy transfer is anisotropic, it can lead to dynamical steering effects that affect reaction probabilities or non-thermal final energy distributions in molecules. Here, we use a machine-learning-enabled simulation framework to compare isotropic and anisotropic models of electronic friction during laser-driven hydrogen evolution on the (111) facet of copper. While anisotropic friction strongly determines the rate of energy transfer into the adsorbate and the fluence dependence of reaction probabilities, it has little effect on final translational, vibrational and rotational energy distributions as these are mainly governed by the potential energy landscape at the barrier.

AI.tldr: 机器学习模拟框架比较铜表面激光驱动氢析出反应中各向同性与各向异性电子摩擦模型，发现各向异性摩擦显著影响能量转移速率和反应概率，但对最终能量分布影响不大。
AI.motivation: 研究表面超快光驱动化学动力学中非绝热能量转移的各向异性效应，探究各向异性电子摩擦如何影响反应概率和分子非热最终能量分布。
AI.method: 使用机器学习模拟框架，在铜(111)晶面上比较激光驱动氢析出反应中各向同性与各向异性电子摩擦模型。
AI.result: 各向异性摩擦强烈决定能量向吸附物转移的速率和反应概率的激光通量依赖性，但对最终平动、振动和转动能量分布影响很小，这些分布主要由势垒处的势能面决定。
AI.conclusion: 各向异性电子摩擦在激光驱动表面反应中主要影响能量转移动力学和反应概率，而最终能量分布主要由势能面地形控制。

title: Detecting pairing symmetry of bilayer nickelates using electronic Raman scattering
summary: The recent discovery of high-temperature superconductivity in both bulk and thin-film bilayer nickelates La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ has garnered significant attention. However, the corresponding pairing symmetry remains debated in both experiments and theoretical studies due to conflicting experimental evidence from bulk and thin-film materials. In this work, we examine the electronic Raman response across different channels for various pairing symmetries within a two-orbital bilayer model. By comparing Raman susceptibilities obtained from multiorbital and band-additive approaches, we demonstrate that Raman response can distinguish between different pairing symmetries and identify pocket-dependent gap amplitudes for both fully gapped and nodal superconducting states. Specifically, the nodal $d_{x^2-y^2}/d_{xy}$-wave pairing exhibits robust low-energy power-law behavior, distinct from a fully gapped pairing. Additionally, for the $s_{\pm}$-wave pairing, the detailed gap anisotropy on the $β$ pocket can be determined. Possible experimental implications are also discussed. Our results highlight the crucial role of multiorbital effects in shaping the Raman spectra and establish electronic Raman scattering as a powerful and symmetry-resolved probe for determining the superconducting gap in unconventional superconductors.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过电子拉曼散射分析双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇的超导配对对称性，发现拉曼响应能区分不同配对对称性并识别口袋依赖的能隙幅度。
AI.motivation: La₃Ni₂O₇在块体和薄膜中都表现出高温超导性，但其配对对称性在实验和理论研究中存在争议，块体和薄膜材料的实验证据相互矛盾。
AI.method: 采用双轨道双层模型，通过多轨道方法和能带叠加方法比较不同配对对称性在不同通道下的电子拉曼响应。
AI.result: 拉曼响应能区分不同配对对称性：节点d_{x²-y²}/d_{xy}波配对表现出明显的低能幂律行为，与完全能隙配对不同；对于s±波配对，可以确定β口袋上的详细能隙各向异性。
AI.conclusion: 多轨道效应在塑造拉曼光谱中起关键作用，电子拉曼散射是确定非常规超导体中超导能隙的强大且对称性分辨的探测工具。

title: Discovery of Symbolic Hamiltonian Expressions with Buckingham-Symplectic Networks
summary: Hamiltonian systems lie at the heart of modeling the physical world. Their defining scalar, the Hamiltonian, encodes both energy conservation and symplectic geometry in its phase-space trajectories. Recent deep learning approaches model Hamiltonian systems by embedding their properties either in the architecture or in the loss function. However, they typically ignore that: i) a Hamiltonian carries units of energy and/or ii) that every integrable Hamiltonian admits a canonical transformation to action-angle coordinates in which the dynamics reduce to a simple rotation on an invariant torus. We propose BuSyNet, a deep learning architecture that combines these two constraints via a dimensionally-consistent, symplectic transformation. A symplectic layer maps input trajectories to lower-dimensional latent action-angle variables, which are then combined with system parameters to discover a symbolic Hamiltonian expression in units of energy. Evaluated on the harmonic oscillator and the Kepler two-body problem (in 2D and 3D), BuSyNet recovers concise, closed-form Hamiltonians that outperform state-of-the-art neural architectures in long-term prediction accuracy and stability, while maintaining interpretability.

AI.tldr: BuSyNet：结合能量量纲约束和正则变换的深度学习架构，用于从轨迹数据中发现符号化的哈密顿量表达式
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在建模哈密顿系统时通常忽略两个关键物理约束：1) 哈密顿量具有能量量纲；2) 可积哈密顿系统可通过正则变换简化为作用量-角变量描述。这些约束的缺失影响了模型的准确性和物理一致性。
AI.method: 提出BuSyNet架构，包含两个核心组件：1) 辛层将输入轨迹映射到低维潜在作用量-角变量；2) 结合系统参数发现具有能量量纲的符号化哈密顿表达式。该方法保持量纲一致性和辛几何结构。
AI.result: 在谐振子和开普勒二体问题（2D和3D）上测试，BuSyNet能够恢复简洁的闭式哈密顿量表达式，在长期预测精度和稳定性方面优于最先进的神经架构，同时保持可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式结合物理约束（能量量纲和正则变换），BuSyNet能够从轨迹数据中发现物理一致的符号化哈密顿量，在保持可解释性的同时提升长期预测性能。

title: Metallic d-wave altermagnetism in WFeB: a platform for electrically switchable perpendicular spin-splitter response
summary: We report the synthesis and magnetic characterization of WFeB and identify it as a metallic d-wave altermagnet representative of a broader TiNiSi-type family. Neutron diffraction, Mössbauer spectroscopy, and magnetometry establish a collinear altermagnetic ordering confirmed by first-principles calculations. The electronic structure shows a nonrelativistic spin splitting of approximately 100 meV, but it also supports a strong spin-splitter transport response. This demonstrates that efficient spin-current generation can occur even with such modest band splitting. Symmetry analysis shows that selected film orientations permit deterministic switching of the Néel vector by current-induced staggered torques, enabling electrical control of a perpendicular spin-splitter response. These results establish WFeB and related TiNiSi-type antiferromagnets as a platform for electrically switchable charge-to-spin conversion driven by altermagnetic symmetry.

AI.tldr: WFeB被鉴定为金属性d波交变磁体，属于TiNiSi型家族，具有约100 meV的非相对论性自旋分裂，支持强自旋分裂输运响应，可实现电流诱导的奈尔矢量确定性切换。
AI.motivation: 探索新型交变磁体材料，特别是具有可电控自旋分裂输运特性的TiNiSi型化合物，以实现高效的自旋电流生成和电控自旋电子器件。
AI.method: 通过合成WFeB并进行中子衍射、穆斯堡尔光谱和磁测量表征，结合第一性原理计算验证其交变磁有序结构，进行对称性分析确定薄膜取向对奈尔矢量切换的影响。
AI.result: 确认WFeB为共线交变磁体，具有约100 meV的非相对论性自旋分裂，支持强自旋分裂输运响应，特定薄膜取向可实现电流诱导的奈尔矢量确定性切换，从而电控垂直自旋分裂响应。
AI.conclusion: WFeB及相关TiNiSi型反铁磁体构成了一个由交变磁对称性驱动的可电切换电荷-自旋转换平台，为自旋电子学应用提供了新材料基础。

title: Field-unmasked quantum geometry in a symmetry-forbidden photocurrent
comment: 19 pages and 4 figures with supplementary information
summary: Frequency- and polarization-resolved photocurrents provide a sensitive probe of hidden symmetry and band geometry in quantum materials. Here we study a chiral cubic sillenite whose global crystal symmetry forbids a longitudinal odd-in-B magneto-photocurrent in the Voigt geometry. Nevertheless, we observe a pronounced longitudinal response across the visible range that is predominantly linear in magnetic field, persists below the band gap, and exhibits strong helicity selectivity, with the circular channel exceeding the linear one and reversing sign upon switching light helicity. We resolve this apparent contradiction by identifying defect-enabled, field-selected spin ordering as the mechanism that lowers the effective magnetic symmetry without altering the global crystal structure. First-principles calculations show that O vacancies generate in-gap bound states and localized magnetic moments on neighboring Bi-O units, stabilized by strong SOC. Although symmetry-related vacancy configurations remain energetically degenerate and preserve the macroscopic T symmetry at zero field, an applied magnetic field selects a time-reversal-broken sector of the defect ensemble and reduces the effective magnetic symmetry to the subgroup that leaves B invariant, thereby lifting the longitudinal selection rule. Importantly, this field-selected symmetry reduction does more than activate a nominally forbidden photocurrent: it unmasks latent quantum-geometric responses encoded in the electronic structure. Momentum-resolved calculations show that the dominant circular and linear magneto-photocurrent channels spatially correlate with Berry-curvature-rich and quantum-metric-rich regions of the Brillouin zone, respectively. Our results establish field-selected defect symmetry lowering as a route to revealing hidden quantum geometry and activating forbidden nonlinear photocurrents in chiral quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 通过缺陷调控实现磁场选择性的对称性破缺，揭示了手性量子材料中隐藏的量子几何响应
AI.motivation: 研究手性立方硅酸盐晶体中看似违反对称性规则的纵向磁光电流现象，探索隐藏的量子几何响应
AI.method: 结合实验观测（频率和偏振分辨的光电流测量）与第一性原理计算，分析氧空位缺陷对对称性和电子结构的影响
AI.result: 观察到违反对称性规则的纵向磁光电流响应，发现氧空位缺陷在磁场作用下选择性地降低有效磁对称性，从而激活了原本被禁止的光电流
AI.conclusion: 磁场选择的缺陷对称性降低是揭示手性量子材料中隐藏量子几何响应和激活禁戒非线性光电流的有效途径

title: Anomalous waiting-time distributions in postselection-free quantum many-body dynamics under continuous monitoring
comment: 18 pages, submitted to "Focus on Non-Hermitian Quantum Many-Body Physics" in Quantum Science and Technology
summary: We investigate waiting-time distributions (WTDs) of quantum jumps in continuously monitored quantum many-body systems, whose unconditional dynamics lead to the trivial infinite-temperature state. We demonstrate that the WTD of a half-chain subsystem exhibits an anomalous tail, markedly deviating from the Poissonian distribution in stark contrast to that of the whole system. By analyzing the spectral properties of the superoperator $\mathscr L_0$, which is defined by removing the jump terms associated with the half-chain subsystem from the full Liouvillian, we find that the long-time behavior with the anomalous tail of the half-chain WTD is governed by the eigenvalue $λ_0\:(<0)$ with the largest real part. We further reveal a qualitative change in the system-size dependence of $λ_0$ as a function of the measurement strength: for sufficiently weak measurement, $λ_0$ decreases proportionally to the system size, while for strong measurement, $λ_0$ scales independently of the system size, signaling the persistence of the anomalous half-chain WTD in the thermodynamic limit. The WTD is extracted solely from the spacetime record of quantum jumps $\{t_i,x_i\}$ and can be experimentally accessed without postselection. Our work establishes a spectral framework for understanding nontrivial WTDs in subsystems of monitored quantum dynamics and provides a novel diagnostics to assess many-body effects on WTDs.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了连续监测量子多体系统中量子跳跃的等待时间分布，发现半链子系统表现出异常尾部分布，与整个系统的泊松分布形成鲜明对比，揭示了测量强度对系统尺寸依赖性的定性变化。
AI.motivation: 研究连续监测量子多体系统中量子跳跃的等待时间分布，特别是在无条件动力学导致平凡无限温度态的情况下，探索子系统与整个系统在统计特性上的差异。
AI.method: 通过分析超算符$\mathscr L_0$的谱特性（该算符通过从完整Liouvillian中移除与半链子系统相关的跳跃项定义），研究半链子系统等待时间分布的长时间行为。提取量子跳跃时空记录$\{t_i,x_i\}$中的等待时间分布。
AI.result: 半链子系统等待时间分布表现出异常尾部，与整个系统的泊松分布显著不同。异常尾部的长时间行为由具有最大实部的特征值$λ_0$主导。测量强度对$λ_0$的系统尺寸依赖性产生定性变化：弱测量时$λ_0$与系统尺寸成比例减小，强测量时$λ_0$与系统尺寸无关。
AI.conclusion: 建立了理解监测量子动力学中子系统非平凡等待时间分布的谱框架，为评估多体效应对等待时间分布的影响提供了新的诊断工具，且该分布可从量子跳跃时空记录中直接提取，无需后选择即可实验访问。

title: Thermodynamics-Informed Accurate pKa Prediction and Protonation State Generation in PlayMolecule AI
summary: Accurate prediction of acid dissociation constants (p$K_{\rm a}$) and the determination of dominant protonation states is critical in drug discovery, influencing molecular properties such as solubility, permeability, and protein-ligand binding. We present Acep$K_{\rm a}$, an advanced application integrated into the PlayMolecule AI platform. Acep$K_{\rm a}$ is built upon the theoretically rigorous Uni-p$K_{\rm a}$ framework, which unifies statistical mechanics with representation learning. By modeling the complete protonation ensemble rather than treating p$K_a$ as a scalar regression target, Acep$K_{\rm a}$ ensures thermodynamic consistency across coupled ionization sites. We describe the application's enhanced architecture, which features a retrained Uni-Mol backbone achieving state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks. Furthermore, we detail critical engineering advancements. These include AceConfgen, a proprietary GPU-accelerated conformer generator that achieves a ~40x speed-up compared to NVIDIA's nvmolkit, a streamlined inference engine to directly protonate molecules, and a 3D-aware modality for applying protonation states to bound ligand poses. Finally, we discuss the integration of Acep$K_{\rm a}$ into the PlayMolecule AI ecosystem, a modern AI-assisted environment for molecular modelling and drug discovery.

AI.tldr: AcepKa是基于Uni-pKa框架的先进pKa预测应用，集成在PlayMolecule AI平台中，通过建模完整的质子化系综确保热力学一致性，并包含GPU加速的构象生成器和3D感知的质子化功能。
AI.motivation: 准确预测酸解离常数(pKa)和确定主要质子化状态对药物发现至关重要，影响分子溶解度、渗透性和蛋白-配体结合等性质。需要开发热力学一致且高效的计算工具来支持药物研发。
AI.method: 基于理论严谨的Uni-pKa框架，将统计力学与表示学习统一。采用重新训练的Uni-Mol骨干网络，包含AceConfgen GPU加速构象生成器（比NVIDIA nvmolkit快40倍）、流线化推理引擎和3D感知模态，直接对分子进行质子化处理。
AI.result: AcepKa在标准基准测试中达到最先进性能，实现了热力学一致性预测，GPU加速构象生成显著提升计算效率，并成功集成到PlayMolecule AI生态系统中。
AI.conclusion: AcepKa提供了一个先进、高效且热力学一致的pKa预测解决方案，通过创新的架构和工程优化，为药物发现中的分子建模提供了强大的AI辅助工具。

title: Uniaxial Compression-Induced Anisotropy and Electronic Dimensionality in the Iron-Based Superconductor FeSe
summary: The evolution of the superconducting transition temperature ($T_c$) in FeSe was investigated under in-plane, out-of-plane, and hydrostatic compression. For pressures up to 0.6 GPa, $T_c$ increases regardless of the compression mode, consistent with the suppression of nematic ordering. However, once nematicity is suppressed, $T_c$ exhibits a striking directional dependence: out-of-plane compression shows behavior similar to the hydrostatic case, with a sharp increase in $T_c$, whereas in-plane compression suppresses superconductivity. First-principles calculations suggest that in-plane compression shifts a hybridized band of Se $p_z$ and Fe $d_{x^2-y^2}$ character so that it crosses the Fermi level along the $Γ$-Z direction, leading to the emergence of an additional metallic band. This leads to an increased three-dimensionality of the electronic structure and may be interpreted as a possible Lifshitz-type change in the Fermi surface. These results indicate that the dimensionality of the electronic structure plays a key role in determining the $T_c$ response of FeSe under different compression modes.

AI.tldr: FeSe的超导转变温度在不同压缩模式下呈现方向依赖性：面内压缩抑制超导，而面外压缩和静水压则提升Tc，这与电子结构维度变化有关
AI.motivation: 研究FeSe在不同压缩模式（面内、面外、静水压）下超导转变温度Tc的演化规律，探索电子结构维度对超导性能的影响机制
AI.method: 通过实验测量不同压缩模式下FeSe的Tc变化，结合第一性原理计算分析能带结构和费米面演化
AI.result: 在0.6 GPa以下，所有压缩模式都提升Tc；但当向列序被抑制后，面内压缩会抑制超导，而面外压缩和静水压则显著提升Tc。面内压缩导致Se pz和Fe dx2-y2杂化能带穿过费米能级，增加电子结构三维性
AI.conclusion: 电子结构的维度性是决定FeSe在不同压缩模式下Tc响应的关键因素，面内压缩引起的费米面Lifshitz转变可能是抑制超导的机制

title: Moment-preserving particle merging via non-negative least squares
summary: A novel particle merging algorithm for rarefied gas dynamics simulations is proposed that can conserve arbitrary velocity and spatial moments of the particle distribution via solving a non-negative least squares problem. An extension that preserves both exact and approximate collision rates is also derived. The algorithm is applied to the simulation of several model rarefied gas dynamics problems, where it exhibits noticeably lower merging-induced error in key macroscopic quantities.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的粒子合并算法，通过求解非负最小二乘问题来守恒粒子分布的任意速度和空间矩，并扩展到保持精确和近似碰撞率，应用于稀薄气体动力学模拟中显著降低合并引起的误差。
AI.motivation: 在稀薄气体动力学模拟中，粒子合并是必要的计算加速技术，但传统方法会损失重要的宏观物理量信息，需要开发能更好守恒物理矩的合并算法。
AI.method: 提出基于非负最小二乘优化的粒子合并算法，通过求解约束优化问题来守恒任意速度和空间矩；进一步扩展算法以保持精确和近似碰撞率。
AI.result: 算法应用于多个模型稀薄气体动力学问题，相比传统方法，在关键宏观物理量上表现出显著更低的合并引起的误差。
AI.conclusion: 新提出的粒子合并算法能有效守恒物理矩和碰撞率，显著提高稀薄气体动力学模拟的精度，为复杂流动问题的高效计算提供了有力工具。

title: AI-assisted Human-in-the-Loop Web Platform for Structural Characterization in Hard drive design
summary: Scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) has become a cornerstone instrument for semiconductor materials metrology, enabling nanoscale analysis of complex multilayer structures that define device performance. Developing effective metrology workflows for such systems requires balancing automation with flexibility; rigid pipelines are brittle to sample variability, while purely manual approaches are slow and subjective. Here, we present a tunable human-AI-assisted workflow framework that enables modular and adaptive analysis of STEM images for device characterization. As an illustrative example, we demonstrate a workflow for automated layer thickness and interface roughness quantification in multilayer thin films. The system integrates gradient-based peak detection with interactive correction modules, allowing human input at the design stage while maintaining fully automated execution across samples. Implemented as a web-based interface, it processes TEM/EMD files directly, applies noise reduction and interface tracking algorithms, and outputs statistical roughness and thickness metrics with nanometer precision. This architecture exemplifies a general approach toward adaptive, reusable metrology workflows - bridging human insight and machine precision for scalable, standardized analysis in semiconductor manufacturing. The code is made available at https://github.com/utkarshp1161/thickness-mapping-webapp

AI.tldr: 开发了一个可调谐的人机协同工作流框架，用于STEM图像的模块化和自适应分析，实现多层薄膜厚度和界面粗糙度的自动化测量
AI.motivation: 半导体材料计量需要平衡自动化与灵活性，刚性流程对样品变化脆弱，纯手动方法则缓慢且主观
AI.method: 基于梯度峰值检测与交互校正模块的可调谐人机协同工作流框架，实现web界面处理TEM/EMD文件，应用降噪和界面跟踪算法
AI.result: 实现了纳米级精度的统计粗糙度和厚度测量，展示了可复用、自适应计量工作流的一般方法
AI.conclusion: 该架构融合人类洞察与机器精度，为半导体制造提供了可扩展、标准化的分析方案

title: Directly visualizing the energy level structure of quantum dot molecules
summary: The orbital, spin and valley degrees of freedom in silicon quantum dots support many modes of spin qubit operation. However, it is generally challenging to obtain information about the energy level spectrum over large ranges of parameter space. We demonstrate a form of spectroscopy that is capable of mapping the energy level structure of a double quantum dot as a function of level detuning, interdot tunnel coupling, and magnetic field. In the one electron regime, we directly observe the transition from the atom like energy levels of isolated quantum dots to molecular like bonding and anti bonding states with increasing interdot tunnel coupling. We also resolve the Zeeman splitting of ground and excited valley states in a magnetic field. In the two electron regime, we gain access to the detuning dependent singlet triplet splitting. Our work may be extended to a broader class of systems, such as strong spin-orbit materials or proximitized quantum dots, allowing the direct extraction of various energy gaps.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了一种能够映射双量子点能级结构的光谱技术，可测量能级失谐、点间隧穿耦合和磁场的影响，在一电子和两电子体系中观测到原子到分子态的转变以及能级分裂。
AI.motivation: 硅量子点中的轨道、自旋和谷自由度支持多种自旋量子比特操作模式，但传统方法难以在大范围参数空间内获取能级谱信息。需要一种能够全面映射能级结构的光谱技术。
AI.method: 开发了一种光谱技术，能够映射双量子点能级结构随能级失谐、点间隧穿耦合和磁场的变化。在一电子体系中观测从孤立量子点的原子态到分子态（成键和反键态）的转变；在两电子体系中测量失谐依赖的单重态-三重态分裂。
AI.result: 成功观测到：1）一电子体系中随隧穿耦合增加，从原子态到分子态的转变；2）磁场中基态和激发态谷态的塞曼分裂；3）两电子体系中失谐依赖的单重态-三重态分裂。
AI.conclusion: 该光谱技术可扩展到更广泛的系统（如强自旋轨道材料或邻近效应量子点），能够直接提取各种能隙信息，为量子比特操作提供重要能级结构信息。

title: Emergent Macroscopic Nonreciprocity from Identical Active Particles via Spontaneous Symmetry Breaking
summary: Nonreciprocity is known to generate a wide range of exotic phenomena in multi-species many-body systems, where different species influence one another through couplings that violate Newton's third law. In contrast, in the absence of explicitly imposed macroscopic nonreciprocal processes, single-species nonreciprocity -- another distinct form of nonreciprocity -- typically plays only a limited role in shaping macroscopic physics. Here, using a single-species Vicsek model with a vision cone and extrinsic noise, we show that spontaneous symmetry breaking (SSB) can dramatically enhance the macroscopic consequences of microscopic single-species nonreciprocity. In the ordered phase, this enhancement gives rise to an emergent macroscopic nonreciprocity that induces the system of identical active particles to admit an effective description with a "two-species" non-Hermitian structure. The resulting SSB-enhanced nonreciprocity substantially promotes traveling-band formation and, more strikingly, drives a novel real-space condensation of identical active particles, characterized by a "traveling line" with vanishing longitudinal width. Our findings uncover a fundamental mechanism by which microscopic single-species nonreciprocity can exert strong macroscopic influences in complex systems.

AI.tldr: 单物种非互易性在宏观尺度通常作用有限，但自发对称破缺能显著增强其宏观效应，导致活性粒子系统中出现新的凝聚态和行波带结构。
AI.motivation: 传统上，单物种非互易性在缺乏显式宏观非互易过程时对宏观物理影响有限。本文旨在探索自发对称破缺如何增强微观单物种非互易性的宏观效应。
AI.method: 使用具有视锥和外在噪声的单物种Vicsek模型，研究自发对称破缺如何增强微观非互易性的宏观表现。
AI.result: 在有序相中，自发对称破缺导致出现宏观非互易性，系统表现出"双物种"非厄米结构，促进行波带形成，并驱动新的实空间凝聚态（"行波线"）。
AI.conclusion: 自发对称破缺是微观单物种非互易性产生强宏观影响的基本机制，为复杂系统中非互易性研究提供了新视角。

title: Analytic nuclear gradients including oriented external electric fields in a molecule-fixed frame
summary: Electric field-assisted chemistry has attracted much attention in recent years, particularly in the context of oriented external electric fields for controlling molecular structure and reactivity. Such fields have been explored in a wide range of applications, including switching materials, nanoparticles, controllable catalysts, medicines, and clinical therapies. However, the use of fixed fields in the laboratory frame becomes ineffective for flexible molecules, as conformational changes can significantly alter their orientations. In this work, we propose two molecular reference frames -- the principal axis frame and the local reference frame -- to define oriented electric fields within the molecular framework. These coordinate systems powerfully eliminate ambiguities in the relative orientation between the applied field and the molecule. Analytic nuclear gradients in the presence of external electric fields are derived and implemented, with an initial application to field-dependent geometry optimizations of cis- and trans-formanilide. Analysis of the resulting field-induced equilibrium structures reveals distinct structural responses, validating the accuracy and robustness of the proposed formalism. The analytic gradient framework enables systematic investigations of molecular properties and reactivity under arbitrarily oriented electric fields, opening new opportunities for computational modeling and rational design in electric field-controlled chemistry.

AI.tldr: 提出两种分子参考系（主轴系和局部参考系）来定义分子框架内的定向电场，消除电场与分子相对取向的模糊性，并推导实现外部电场下的解析核梯度，应用于场依赖的几何优化。
AI.motivation: 实验室固定坐标系中的电场对柔性分子效果不佳，因为构象变化会显著改变分子取向，导致电场与分子相对方向不明确，需要建立分子参考系来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出两种分子参考系：主轴参考系（基于分子惯性主轴）和局部参考系（基于特定化学键或官能团），推导并实现外部电场下的解析核梯度，应用于顺式和反式甲酰苯胺的场依赖几何优化。
AI.result: 成功消除了电场与分子相对取向的模糊性，获得了场诱导的平衡结构，顺式和反式甲酰苯胺显示出不同的结构响应，验证了所提方法的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 解析梯度框架能够系统研究任意取向电场下的分子性质和反应性，为电场控制化学的计算建模和理性设计开辟了新机会。

title: FerBo: a noise resilient qubit hybridizing Andreev and fluxonium states
summary: We propose a novel superconducting quantum circuit that should be robust against both relaxation and dephasing over a wide and experimentally accessible parameter range. The circuit consists of a parallel arrangement of a large inductance, a small capacitor, and a well-transmitting Josephson weak link. Protection against relaxation arises from the hybridization between the fermionic degree of freedom associated with Andreev levels in the weak link and the bosonic electromagnetic mode of the LC circuit, hence its name: FerBo. Furthermore, as in the fluxonium qubit, delocalization of the wavefunctions in phase space provides resilience against dephasing.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新型超导量子电路FerBo，通过铁磁-玻色混合机制，在宽参数范围内同时抑制弛豫和退相干
AI.motivation: 传统超导量子比特面临弛豫和退相干问题，需要设计同时抑制两种噪声的电路结构
AI.method: 采用并联大电感、小电容和约瑟夫森弱连接结构，通过安德烈夫能级与LC电路电磁模式的混合实现铁磁-玻色混合保护机制
AI.result: FerBo电路在宽且实验可及参数范围内对弛豫和退相干都具有鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: FerBo电路设计为超导量子比特提供了一种同时抑制弛豫和退相干的有效方案

title: Procela: Epistemic Governance in Mechanistic Simulations Under Structural Uncertainty
summary: Mechanistic simulations typically assume fixed ontologies: variables, causal relationships, and resolution policies are static. This assumption fails when the true causal structure is contested or unidentifiable-as in antimicrobial resistance (AMR) spread, where contact, environmental, and selection ontologies compete. We introduce Procela, a Python framework where variables act as epistemic authorities that maintain complete hypothesis memory, mechanisms encode competing ontologies as causal units, and governance observes epistemic signals and mutates system topology at runtime. This is the first framework where simulations test their own assumptions. We instantiate Procela for AMR in a hospital network with three competing families. Governance detects coverage decay, policy fragility, and runs structural probes. Results show 20.4% error reduction and 69% cumulative regret improvement over baseline. All experiments are reproducible with full auditability. Procela establishes a new paradigm: simulations that model not only the world but their own modeling process, enabling adaptation under structural uncertainty.

AI.tldr: Procela是一个Python框架，让模拟能够测试自身假设，通过变量作为认知权威、机制编码竞争本体论、治理系统动态调整拓扑结构，应用于抗菌素耐药性传播研究。
AI.motivation: 传统机制模拟假设固定本体论（变量、因果关系、分辨率策略静态），但在真实因果结构存在争议或不可识别时（如抗菌素耐药性传播中接触、环境、选择等本体论竞争）会失效。需要能够处理结构不确定性的模拟框架。
AI.method: Procela框架：1) 变量作为认知权威，维护完整的假设记忆；2) 机制将竞争本体论编码为因果单元；3) 治理系统观察认知信号并在运行时突变系统拓扑结构。这是首个能够测试自身假设的模拟框架。
AI.result: 在医院网络抗菌素耐药性传播的实例中，Procela检测到覆盖衰减、策略脆弱性，并运行结构探针。结果显示比基线减少20.4%误差，提升69%累积遗憾。所有实验可复现且具有完全可审计性。
AI.conclusion: Procela建立了一个新范式：模拟不仅建模世界，还建模自身的建模过程，能够在结构不确定性下实现自适应。这是首个能够测试自身假设的模拟框架。

title: Comparative study of room temperature and quench condensed bismuth films: morphology and electronic characteristics
summary: A comparison between properties of bismuth thin films deposited at substrate temperatures of 296 K (room temperature) and 77 K (quench condensed) is studied across epitaxial, amorphous, and van der Waals substrates. The experiments demonstrate changes in crystallinity, morphology, and electrical transport arising from the influence of substrate temperature. Moreover, the work highlights changes in grain size, roughness, X-ray diffraction peak intensities, and preferred orientation between the two deposition temperatures. The orientation of the films deposited at 77 K is preferentially (110), compared to (111) for films deposited at room temperature. Films grown at 77 K differ from those deposited at room temperature, exhibiting lower surface roughness but smaller grain size, which leads to increased electrical resistivity in quench condensed films. The decrease of substrate temperature during the deposition appears to induce slightly more strain in depositions on the amorphous and van der Waals substrates than on the epitaxial substrates. Lastly, quench condensed films exhibit lower carrier mobility and lower carrier density compared to room temperature films. This study elucidates previously incompletely understood processes in bismuth deposition and raises new questions regarding growth on van der Waals surfaces.

AI.tldr: 比较在296K（室温）和77K（淬火冷凝）衬底温度下沉积的铋薄膜在三种不同衬底上的性能差异，发现温度变化显著影响薄膜的结晶性、形貌和电学性质。
AI.motivation: 研究衬底温度对铋薄膜沉积过程的影响，特别是比较室温沉积与淬火冷凝沉积的差异，以阐明之前未完全理解的铋沉积过程，并探索在范德华表面上的生长机制。
AI.method: 在三种不同类型衬底（外延衬底、非晶衬底、范德华衬底）上分别于296K（室温）和77K（淬火冷凝）温度下沉积铋薄膜，通过分析薄膜的结晶性、形貌、X射线衍射、表面粗糙度、晶粒尺寸和电学输运性质来比较两种沉积温度的影响。
AI.result: 77K沉积的薄膜与室温沉积相比：1）择优取向从(111)变为(110)；2）表面粗糙度更低但晶粒尺寸更小；3）电学性质上电阻率更高、载流子迁移率和载流子密度更低；4）在非晶和范德华衬底上诱导的应变比在外延衬底上更大。
AI.conclusion: 衬底温度显著影响铋薄膜的结构和电学性质，淬火冷凝沉积产生不同的晶体取向、更小的晶粒和更高的电阻率，同时揭示了在范德华表面上生长的新问题，为理解铋沉积过程提供了重要见解。

title: Nonlinear Frequency-Momentum Topology and Doubling of Multifold Exceptional Points
summary: Even in the linear limit, the topology of multifold (also called higher-order) exceptional points across the Brillouin zone has lacked a general characterization, leaving the doubling theorem essentially limited to two-fold exceptional points. Here, we establish the doubling theorem of $n$-fold exceptional points [EP$n$s ($n=2,3,\ldots$)] for systems where nonlinearity enters through eigenvalues. To this end, we introduce new topological invariants, termed frequency-momentum winding numbers, which characterize nonlinear EP$n$s in $m$-band systems throughout the Brillouin zone for arbitrary $n$ and $m$ ($m\geq n$). These invariants enable a unified proof of the doubling theorem in the absence of symmetry and under several symmetry constraints, including parity-time ($PT$) and charge-conjugation-parity symmetries. Furthermore, even in the linear limit, the frequency-momentum winding number indicates $\mathbb{Z}$ topology of $PT$-symmetric EP$2$s which is beyond the previously reported $\mathbb{Z}_2$ topology. The frequency-momentum winding numbers can also be extended to a class of coupled resonators in which nonlinearity enters via the eigenvectors, whereas the spectrum is determined by a nonlinear scalar equation for the frequency.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了n重异常点的加倍定理，引入了频率-动量绕数作为新的拓扑不变量，统一证明了在无对称性和多种对称性约束下的加倍定理，并揭示了PT对称EP2s的ℤ拓扑结构。
AI.motivation: 多重复合异常点在布里渊区中的拓扑结构缺乏一般性描述，加倍定理主要局限于二重异常点。需要建立适用于任意n重异常点的拓扑理论框架。
AI.method: 引入频率-动量绕数作为新的拓扑不变量，用于表征非线性n重异常点在m带系统中的拓扑特性。这些不变量适用于任意n和m（m≥n），并能统一证明加倍定理。
AI.result: 成功证明了无对称性和多种对称性约束（包括PT对称和电荷共轭宇称对称）下的n重异常点加倍定理。在线性极限下，频率-动量绕数揭示了PT对称二重异常点的ℤ拓扑结构，超越了之前报道的ℤ₂拓扑。
AI.conclusion: 频率-动量绕数为非线性多重复合异常点提供了统一的拓扑描述框架，扩展了加倍定理的适用范围，并揭示了新的拓扑结构。该方法还可扩展到一类耦合谐振器系统。

title: Tunable information insulation induced by constraint mismatch
summary: We study a composite model of two $1D$ $PXP$ chains with dual constraints, forming a junction that acts as an infinite kinematic barrier to quantum information exchange. Moreover, the hard wall at the junction which acts as a perfect reflector, preventing any quantum information leakage between the two sides of the composite chain, can be made permeable by relaxing the constraint at the junction sites. Multiple frozen junctions shatter the Hilbert space into disjoint Krylov fragments, the number of which increases exponentially with the engineered defects. Furthermore, the energy level statistics in each symmetry-resolved sector are strictly Poissonian, demonstrating that the tensor sum of the disjoint Hamiltonians results in a pure superposition of the chaotic spectra of the sub- $PXP$ chains. We also find that a chirally protected zero-energy mode can exist which has local peaks at the physical edges and within the bulk near the junction sites. This state is protected from hybridization with bulk states induced by any chirality preserving disorder. Due to the tensor product structure of the eigenfunctions, the non-zero energy scar states also multiply in number. Finally, we introduce novel Fock states with spatially tunable thermal and athermal regions. This architecture can be readily realized in programmable Rydberg atom platforms using optical tweezers, addressing beams and facilitation techniques.

AI.tldr: 研究具有双约束的两个1D PXP链复合模型，连接点形成无限运动学屏障阻止量子信息交换，但可通过放松约束使其渗透。多个冻结连接点将希尔伯特空间分裂为指数增长的Krylov碎片，每个对称性分解的能级统计严格泊松分布。发现手性保护的零能模和数量倍增的疤痕态，并引入具有空间可调热与非热区域的新颖Fock态。
AI.motivation: 研究量子多体系统中约束和连接点如何影响量子信息传输、能级统计和特殊量子态（如疤痕态和零能模），探索在可编程Rydberg原子平台中实现具有可控热与非热区域的新型量子架构。
AI.method: 构建两个1D PXP链的复合模型，在连接点施加双约束形成运动学屏障。通过放松连接点约束使其渗透，分析多个冻结连接点对希尔伯特空间的分裂效应。使用对称性分解和能级统计分析，研究手性保护的零能模和疤痕态的倍增。引入具有空间可调热与非热区域的新颖Fock态。
AI.result: 连接点作为无限运动学屏障阻止量子信息交换，但放松约束后可渗透。多个冻结连接点将希尔伯特空间指数分裂为Krylov碎片，每个对称性分解的能级统计严格泊松分布。发现手性保护的零能模，在物理边缘和连接点附近有局域峰，且不受手性保持的杂质影响。非零能疤痕态数量倍增。成功设计出具有空间可调热与非热区域的新型Fock态。
AI.conclusion: 该复合PXP链模型展示了约束工程如何控制量子信息传输、能级统计和特殊量子态。连接点的约束调节可实现从完全隔离到部分渗透的转变，多个冻结连接点导致希尔伯特空间指数分裂。手性保护的零能模和倍增的疤痕态为量子信息处理提供新资源。提出的架构可在可编程Rydberg原子平台中实现，为量子模拟和量子计算提供新方向。

title: A P-Adaptive Hybridizable Discontinuous Galerkin Spectral Element Method for Electrostatic Particle-in-Cell Simulations
summary: This paper presents a p-adaptive high-order hybridizable discontinuous Galerkin spectral element method (HDG-SEM) for solving the Poisson equation in electrostatic plasma simulations using particle-in-cell (PIC) schemes. This approach enables element-local refinement of the polynomial degree, concentrating computational effort specifically in regions with strong gradients. Thus, the method significantly reduces the global number of degrees of freedom compared to uniform high-order methods. The proposed method is implemented in the open-source framework PICLas and validated through a series of benchmark test cases, including a dielectric sphere and a one-dimensional plasma sheath. Finally, a two-dimensional axisymmetric simulation of an ion optic demonstrates the method's capability to efficiently model complex plasma phenomena but also highlights current limitations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种p自适应高阶可杂交间断伽辽金谱元法(HDG-SEM)，用于静电等离子体模拟中的泊松方程求解，通过局部多项式阶数自适应减少全局自由度
AI.motivation: 在粒子网格(PIC)等离子体模拟中，需要高效求解泊松方程。传统均匀高阶方法计算成本高，而自适应方法可以将计算资源集中在梯度大的区域
AI.method: 采用p自适应高阶可杂交间断伽辽金谱元法(HDG-SEM)，实现单元局部多项式阶数自适应细化，在PICLas开源框架中实现
AI.result: 通过介质球和一维等离子体鞘层等基准测试验证了方法有效性，二维轴对称离子光学模拟展示了方法处理复杂等离子体现象的能力，但也揭示了当前局限性
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著减少了全局自由度，提高了计算效率，能够有效模拟复杂等离子体现象，但仍有改进空间

title: Robust $d$-wave altermagnetism in $\mathrm{RbCr_2Se_2O}$
summary: The $\mathrm{KV_2Se_2O}$, $\mathrm{Rb_{1-δ}V_2Te_2O}$ and $\mathrm{Cs_{1-δ}V_2Te_2O}$ are experimentally confirmed to adopt either C-type or G-type antiferromagnetic configuration, corresponding to apparent or hidden altermagnetism. However, their nearly degenerate energies lead to inconsistent experimental assignments between the two antiferromagnetic configurations. Here, we predict that the experimentally synthesized $\mathrm{RbCr_2Se_2O}$ is a robust $d$-wave altermagnetic metal, since the energy difference between C-type and G-type configurations is large, which is independent of electron correlation strength and van der Waals interaction.
